programs.title: AI & Machine Learning Workshop
programs.description: Hands-on workshop covering deep learning, neural networks, and practical AI applications. Learn from industry experts.

programs.title: Smart City Hackathon 2024
programs.description: 48-hour hackathon to build innovative solutions for smart city challenges. Win prizes worth ₹5 lakhs!

programs.title: Robotics for Schools Initiative
programs.description: Introducing robotics education in schools. Free robotics kits and training for selected schools.

programs.title: Tech Innovation Expo 2024
programs.description: Showcase your innovative projects and connect with industry leaders. Open for students and startups.

programs.title: Code Sprint Challenge
programs.description: Weekly coding challenges with real-world problems. Top performers get internship opportunities.

programs.title: Full Stack Web Development Bootcamp
programs.description: Intensive bootcamp covering MERN stack, deployment, and best practices. Build 5 real-world projects.

programs.title: STEM Education Program
programs.description: Comprehensive STEM curriculum for grades 6-12. Includes lab equipment and teacher training.

programs.title: HealthTech Innovation Challenge
programs.description: Build healthcare solutions using AI, IoT, and mobile technologies. Mentorship from healthcare experts.

programs.title: Robotics & Automation Expo
programs.description: Largest robotics expo in South India. Live demos, competitions, and industry networking.

programs.title: Data Science Competition
programs.description: Analyze real datasets and build predictive models. Win cash prizes and job opportunities.

programs.title: Cloud Computing & DevOps Workshop
programs.description: Master AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines. Get AWS certification guidance.

programs.title: Coding Club for Kids
programs.description: After-school coding clubs teaching Scratch, Python, and game development to kids aged 8-14.
